---
title: "A Vantage Ground and Other Stories Reprinted from the Monthly Packet and the Churchman\'s Companion"
---

## A Vantage Ground and Other Stories Reprinted from the Monthly Packet and the Churchman\'s Companion

**Author:** Florence Wilford
**Date:** 1879
**Imprint:** London: Masters

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
